title: NABCONS Project Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) has released the official Project Specialist Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the NABCONS Project Specialist Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding an MBA or equivalent qualification can apply online up to 01 June 2026. Age limit details are available in the official notification. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Specialist: MBA or equivalent from a reputed and recognized University or Institution with a minimum of 5 years of experience, including at least 2 years in executing Programme/Project Management Consultancy assignments.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated remuneration based on experience, educational qualification and overall suitability. Salary will be commensurate based upon experience and last drawn salary.
salary_details.details: Consolidated remuneration based on experience, educational qualification and overall suitability. Salary will be commensurate based upon experience and last drawn salary.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Project Specialist Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABCONS Project Specialist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NABCONS Project Specialist recruitment is 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Specialist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Project Specialist position by NABCONS.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Specialist role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is an MBA or equivalent degree from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the required work experience for the Project Specialist position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum of 5 years of work experience, with at least 2 years in Programme/Project Management Consultancy assignments.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online through the official NABCONS website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Project Specialist post?
faq.answer: The remuneration is consolidated and will be based on experience, educational qualification, and overall suitability, commensurate with experience and last drawn salary.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Specialist role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes preliminary screening/shortlisting followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed via the 'Official Notification PDF' link in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of NABCONS?
faq.answer: The official website of NABCONS is www.nabcons.com, which can be accessed via the 'Official Website' link in the Important Links section.
